reference: I passed a kidney stone four days ago. It was very painful, and I was hospitalized but have since been discharged. Immediately after being discharged, I was constipated for a day, then began having serious lower pelvic cramps. After the first bowel movement, which was tough, I now have cramps and there is mostly blood. I do have some external hemorrhoids from the constipation episode yesterday. The blood is bright red. Is the cramping and blood from the hemorrhoids, or is something else going on?
